    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    P

    passportNo - Variable in class classes.Applicant
    Applicant's passport number
    PENDING - Enum constant in enum class classes.Status
     
    printAdminMenu() - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Displays the admin menu options.
    printApplicationDetails(Application) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints detailed information about an application.
    printApplicationRow(Application) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints a single application row in tabular format.
    printApplications(VisaOfficeSystem) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints all applications.
    printApplications(VisaOfficeSystem, Status, LocalDate, Object) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    General method for printing filtered applications.
    printApplicationsBeforeDate(VisaOfficeSystem, LocalDate) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints applications before a specific date.
    printAssignedApplications(VisaOfficeSystem, Officer) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints applications assigned to an officer.
    printMainMenu() - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Displays the main menu options.
    printMyApplications(VisaOfficeSystem, Applicant) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints applications belonging to an applicant.
    printPendingApplications(VisaOfficeSystem) - Static method in class classes.Tester
    Prints pending applications.
    processApplication(Application, Status) - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Updates the status of the given application.
